object.name: biblio_reference
object.property: <model xmlns:easyform="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/easyform" xmlns:form="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/form" xmlns:i18n="http://xml.zope.org/namespaces/i18n" xmlns:indexer="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/indexer" xmlns:lingua="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/lingua" xmlns:marshal="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/marshal" xmlns:security="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/security" xmlns:users="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/users" xmlns="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/schema"> <schema> <field name="bibtype" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Bibliographic type name</title> </field> <field name="refURL" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Resource URL</title> </field> <field name="abstract" type="zope.schema.Text"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Abstract</title> </field> <field name="institution_or_usaid_bureau_author" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Institution or USAID Bureau Author</title> </field> <field name="ancilaryData" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description>This maps to the Ancilary Data field in the DEC</description> <required>False</required> <title>Ancilary Data</title> </field> <field name="pub_date_year" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description>Enter the four digit year in which the resource was published. For example: 2006</description> <required>False</required> <title>Publication Date (Year only)</title> </field> <field name="pub_date_text" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description>Storage of any fuzzy text dates, for example the 'Date of Publication Freeforrm' from DEC</description> <required>False</required> <title>Publication Date string</title> </field> <field name="source" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Source</title> </field> <field name="sourceUID" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description>Item source UID (internal to CMS)</description> <required>False</required> <title>Source UID</title> </field> <field name="notes" type="plone.app.textfield.RichText"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Notes</title> </field> <field name="source_uid" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Source UID</title> </field> </schema> </model>
